subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-10-25 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: This power is not verbal. It must be actual, demonstrative, dynamic. This power has gone out of the body of Islam.
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise of Western values; culture, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
